strong_decision.decision: Implement /commit as a real extension command in pi/extensions/workflow-commands.ts instead of a prompt-template wrapper.
strong_decision.why_good: This removes chatty back-and-forth, lets the command use ctx.ui confirm/select/input directly, and keeps the commit workflow deterministic while preserving explicit confirmation before commit/push.
strong_decision.summary: Implement /commit as a real extension command in pi/extensions/workflow-commands.ts instead of a prompt-template wrapper.

key_file.role: Registers shared Pi slash commands; adding a command here makes it available in sessions where this extension is loaded.

{"pattern":"For this dotfiles repo's Pi extension workflow, Bun-first setup on macOS needs two compatibility layers: resolve global Pi package paths from ~/.bun/install/global/node_modules instead of npm globals, and run tests with `bun ...

{"pattern":"In interactive zsh wrappers, using background jobs for short-lived git fetch timeouts causes noisy job-control messages ([n], done, exit 1). Prefer foreground timeout/gtimeout wrappers to keep startup clean."}

observation.summary: Pi 0.68.0 breaking changes are concentrated in SDK/tool factory exports and explicit cwd/resource-loader inputs. This dotfiles repo's Pi customizations are extension-based and already use tool-name allowlists in subagent spawning, so no mandatory compatibility edits were found.
